mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as gamesPlayed, SUM(CASE WHEN IS_WIN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as wins, SUM(CASE WHEN IS_WIN = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as losses FROM TBL_MATCH_RECORDS WHERE OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ = #{ownedPlayerSeq}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT MATCH_SEQ as matchSeq, OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ as ownedPlayerSeq, MATCH_TYPE as matchType, OPPONENT_NAME as opponentName, OPPONENT_RACE as opponentRace, MAP_NAME as mapName, IS_WIN as isWin, MATCH_DATE as matchDate FROM TBL_MATCH_RECORDS WHERE OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ = #{ownedPlayerSeq} ORDER BY MATCH_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT op.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ AS ownedPlayerSeq, p.PLAYER_NAME AS playerName, p.RACE AS race, op.CURRENT_RARITY AS currentRarity, COUNT(*) AS gamesPlayed, SUM(CASE WHEN r.IS_WIN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS wins, SUM(CASE WHEN r.IS_WIN = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS losses, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN r.IS_WIN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS winRate FROM TBL_MATCH_RECORDS r JOIN TBL_OWNED_PLAYERS op ON r.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ = op.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ JOIN TBL_PLAYERS p ON op.PLAYER_SEQ = p.PLAYER_SEQ WHERE op.USER_ID = #{userId} GROUP BY op.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ, p.PLAYER_NAME, p.RACE, op.CURRENT_RARITY ORDER BY gamesPlayed DESC, wins DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT op.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ AS ownedPlayerSeq, p.PLAYER_NAME AS playerName, p.RACE AS race, op.CURRENT_RARITY AS currentRarity, COUNT(*) AS gamesPlayed, SUM(CASE WHEN r.IS_WIN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS wins, SUM(CASE WHEN r.IS_WIN = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS losses, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN r.IS_WIN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS winRate FROM TBL_MATCH_RECORDS r JOIN TBL_OWNED_PLAYERS op ON r.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ = op.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ JOIN TBL_PLAYERS p ON op.PLAYER_SEQ = p.PLAYER_SEQ WHERE op.USER_ID = #{userId} GROUP BY op.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ, p.PLAYER_NAME, p.RACE, op.CURRENT_RARITY HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY winRate DESC, wins DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT op.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ AS ownedPlayerSeq, p.PLAYER_NAME AS playerName, p.RACE AS race, op.CURRENT_RARITY AS currentRarity, COUNT(*) AS gamesPlayed, SUM(CASE WHEN r.IS_WIN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS wins, SUM(CASE WHEN r.IS_WIN = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS losses, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN r.IS_WIN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS winRate FROM TBL_MATCH_RECORDS r JOIN TBL_OWNED_PLAYERS op ON r.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ = op.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ JOIN TBL_PLAYERS p ON op.PLAYER_SEQ = p.PLAYER_SEQ WHERE op.USER_ID = #{userId} GROUP BY op.OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ, p.PLAYER_NAME, p.RACE, op.CURRENT_RARITY ORDER BY wins DESC, winRate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_MATCH_RECORDS ( MATCH_SEQ, OWNED_PLAYER_SEQ, MATCH_TYPE, OPPONENT_NAME, OPPONENT_RACE, MAP_NAME, IS_WIN, MATCH_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_MATCH_RECORDS.NEXTVAL, #{ownedPlayerSeq}, #{matchType}, #{opponentName}, #{opponentRace}, #{mapName}, #{isWin}, #{matchDate} )
